goal_text:
You are planning your trip in Cambridge.
You are looking for a 'train'. The train should depart from 'cambridge' and should leave on 'monday'.
The train should go to 'kings lynn' and should 'arrive by 13:45'.
Make sure you get 'departure time' and 'travel time'.
You are also looking for a 'particular attraction'. Its name is called 'clare hall'.
Make sure you get 'phone number', 'address', and 'postcode'.Remember. You don't want booking for train. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are planning your trip in Cambridge
You are looking for a train. The train should depart from cambridge and should leave on monday
The train should go to kings lynn and should arrive by 13:45
Make sure you get departure time and travel time
You are also looking for a particular attraction. Its name is called clare hall
Make sure you get phone number, address, and postcode
